profile.name: Arush Gumber
profile.roleLine: Researcher, engineer, founder · in that order, depending on the day

connect.label: Request résumé
connect.subject: Let's connect
connect.body:
Hi Arush,

I came across your portfolio and would like to connect. Could you please share your résumé?

Thanks!

projects.title: LangGraph Multi-Agent Stock Reranker
projects.subtitle: Implicit-feedback collaborative filtering for weekly equity ranking
projects.problem: Rank weekly Indian equities as regimes shift and signals decay.
projects.built: A bounded LangGraph multi-agent reranker over a tuned blend of 7 expert rankers, with LLM sub-agents injecting macro, news and fundamentals.
projects.metricLabel: cumulative · Sharpe 1.45 · beat Nifty50 in 28/41 wks

projects.title: High-Frequency Algorithmic Trading System
projects.subtitle: Real-time NSE execution & monitoring · in development
projects.problem: Trade NSE intraday in real time, from signal to execution to monitoring.
projects.built: A real-time platform with LSTM/Transformer forecasters on NSE data, Kite API execution, a sentiment-analysis pipeline and a Streamlit monitoring dashboard.

projects.title: DroidPlanner: JEPA World Model
projects.subtitle: Multi-step latent consistency & spatial aggregation for planning
projects.problem: Plan offline, goal-conditioned, from latent dynamics, stably.
projects.built: Extended LeWM-style JEPA with a K=3 latent-consistency loss and a PatchSpatialAggregator restoring ViT patch info via gated pyramid fusion.

projects.title: Few-Shot Visual Search in Satellite Imagery
projects.subtitle: NCIIPC Startup India AI Grand Challenge (PS-03)
projects.problem: Locate rare, tiny targets (<0.1% of image) from a handful of labels.
projects.built: A multi-stage detect-then-verify pipeline: weak-label expansion, ensembled detection, and feature/geometry verification to kill false positives.
projects.metricLabel: over baseline · Top 3 in PS-03 · Stage 2 cleared · ₹38L

projects.title: REDACT: Data Privacy Platform
projects.subtitle: Smart India Hackathon 2024 · Top 2 / 100+
projects.problem: Redact PII across text, images and documents reliably.
projects.built: A multimodal redaction engine with BERT-based NLP and few-shot domain adaptation for legal/medical docs, behind a secure pipeline.

projects.title: Multimodal Price Prediction
projects.subtitle: Amazon ML Challenge 2025 · Rank 54 / 20,000+
projects.problem: Predict product price from image + text without price lookups.
projects.built: Fused CLIP ViT-B/32 and DINOv2 visual embeddings with TF-IDF text via cross-attention; global embedding caches for 5× inference speedup.

projects.title: Underwater Acoustic Event Detection
projects.subtitle: Unified framework · manuscript in preparation
projects.problem: Assess biodiversity and vessel activity from long marine soundscapes.
projects.built: Standardized multiple marine acoustic datasets and a joint detection framework over long-duration audio.

projects.title: MusicBind: Cross-Modal Song Retrieval
projects.subtitle: Research prototype
projects.problem: Align audio, text, image and graph in one space for retrieval.
projects.built: A PyTorch cross-modal system in a hyperbolic embedding space with GNNs, evaluated on GTZAN.

projects.title: Custom RISC-V Assembler & Simulator
projects.subtitle: RV32I ISA · course project (Prof. Sujay Deb)
projects.problem: Assemble and execute the full RV32I instruction set, correctly.
projects.built: A complete assembler and simulator with full instruction encoding, memory management and a CI/CD pipeline.

projects.title: BidBazar: Real-time Auction Platform
projects.subtitle: Concurrent bidding · course project (Prof. Mukesh Mohania)
projects.problem: Resolve concurrent bids for 1000+ users without races.
projects.built: A real-time auction platform with SQL-optimized bid resolution and ML-based price forecasting.

projects.title: Marvel Birds: Game Engine
projects.subtitle: Physics engine · course project (Prof. Sambuddho Chakravarty)
projects.problem: Build a 2D physics engine with clean, extensible architecture.
projects.built: A LibGDX physics engine with collision detection, using Factory and Observer design patterns.

publications.title: Uncovering the Latent Potential of Deep Intermediate Representations
publications.summary: LOES selects task-discriminative layer subspaces under orthogonality/isotropy constraints, with a geometric fine-tuning loss; gains over transfer baselines grow with depth.

publications.title: MSCAN: Multistage Spinal Canal Stenosis Grading Using Cross-Attention
publications.summary: Automated MRI spinal-stenosis grading at 0.971 AUROC with YOLO detection and multi-view cross-attention.

publications.title: DentalNet: Geometric-Aware Multi-View Transformer for Dental 3D Scan Analysis
publications.summary: 2D/3D fusion at 67% F1; cross-attention integrates intraoral views with 3D point clouds for IOTN-DHC classification.

publications.title: Scalable and Interpretable Detection of LLM-Generated Code
publications.summary: NanoDroid, a 5.1M-param backbone-free detector at 90.8% weighted F1, rivaling 125M UniXcoder at ~25× fewer parameters; accepted at the Deep Learning for Code and Human-AI Co-Creativity workshops.

publications.title: Graph-Based Cross-Modal Learning for Drug–Target Affinity Prediction
publications.summary: Heterogeneous GNN fusing molecular and ESM-2 protein graphs; 14.95% lower MSE and 5.05% higher CI over DMFF-DTA on KIBA cold-drug.

publications.title: Adaptive Trimodal Fusion for Mental-Health Symptom Classification in Memes
publications.summary: A 1.7M-param trimodal head over frozen CLIP + MentalBART; 0.707 Macro-F1 on AxiOM, surpassing M3H with ~70× fewer trainable params.

publications.title: Where to Read a Frozen Audio Encoder: Objective-Induced Geometry and Zero-Label Layer Selection
publications.summary: Geometry-driven label-free layer selection recovers 24–38 points lost to final-layer readout; up to 23.9% lower low-resource ASR CER.

publications.title: Faithful Is Not Interpretable: Sparse Features, Circuits, and Robustness in Frozen Audio Encoders
publications.summary: SAE/transcoder analysis across seven encoders separates faithfulness from interpretability under acoustic corruption.

publications.title: SocialDF: Benchmark Dataset and Detection Model for Deepfake Content
publications.summary: A real-world deepfake benchmark with a multi-agent LLM framework that beats SOTA lip-sync methods via fact-checking integration.

publications.title: TOAM-YOLO: A Tiny Object-Aware Multi-Expert YOLO Framework for Diverse Domains
publications.summary: TOA-MoE (Hessian-curvature + Fourier-frequency experts with 3-level attention) plus BiFPN and CARAFE fusion, plug-and-play on YOLOv11/v12; consistent mAP gains across five tiny-object and blood-cell benchmarks while adding only 0.75M parameters.

founder.name: StarkVision
founder.description: A 20-member student AI/ML research collective whose work spans an ICML 2026 Spotlight, 6 ICML 2026 workshop papers, CVPR 2025 (Demo Track) and a TMLR journal paper. I drove the core technical work behind our entry to the Govt. of India NCIIPC AI Grand Challenge, and mentor 10+ juniors from idea to acceptance.

founderStats.label: in PS-03 of 670+ nationwide · Stage 2 cleared

experience.title: Incoming SWE Intern, S&P Global
experience.detail: Joining the engineering team in June 2026, bringing ML research into production systems.

experience.title: Computer Vision Research, Centre for AI (SBILab)
experience.detail: Under Prof. Anubha Gupta at the Centre for AI / SBILab, IIIT-Delhi: object/deepfake/tiny-object detection and multi-modal learning; co-first-author on multiple manuscripts.

experience.title: Knowledge-Graph Learning, University of Vienna
experience.detail: With Prof. Dagmar Gromann (remote) on knowledge-graph representation learning and parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT).

experience.title: Computational Biology, UC San Diego
experience.detail: With Prof. Pengtao Xie (remote): domain-adaptive transformers and Geneformer fine-tuning for phenotype classification from genomic data.

experience.title: Teaching Assistant, Machine Learning
experience.detail: Mentored a 120-student cohort (PhD/MTech/BTech): assignments, Kaggle competitions, office hours.

news.title: Incoming Software Engineer Intern, S&P Global
news.detail: Joining the engineering team in Gurgaon.

news.title: Research Collaborator, University of Vienna
news.detail: With Prof. Dagmar Gromann on knowledge-graph representation learning and PEFT.

news.title: ICML 2026 Spotlight: LOES (co-author)
news.detail: Representation-geometry method accepted to the ICML main conference as a Spotlight.

news.title: TMLR: TOAM-YOLO accepted (co-first author)
news.detail: A tiny-object-aware multi-expert YOLO framework; consistent gains across five benchmarks at +0.75M parameters.

news.title: Six ICML 2026 workshop acceptances
news.detail: NanoDroid across two workshops (Deep Learning for Code and Human-AI Co-Creativity), drug–target affinity, trimodal memes, and two frozen-audio-encoder studies.

news.title: Amazon ML Challenge: Rank 54 / 20,000+
news.detail: Top 0.3% with a multimodal price-prediction model.

news.title: NCIIPC AI Grand Challenge: Top 3 in PS-03, ₹38L
news.detail: Top 3 in our problem statement (PS-03) and Stage 2 cleared, among 670+ startups nationwide; ₹38 lakhs secured.

news.title: Smart India Hackathon 2024: National Finalist
news.detail: Top 2 of 100+ teams with the REDACT data-privacy platform.

news.title: Co-founded StarkVision
news.detail: A 20-member student AI/ML research collective at IIIT-Delhi; work accepted at an ICML 2026 Spotlight, 6 ICML workshops, CVPR 2025 Demo and TMLR.

about.bio: I work on representation learning across computer vision, audio, graphs and markets, with a recurring thread of reading the geometry of what models learn. I care about the moment a messy problem snaps into a representation where the answer is suddenly easy.
about.credentials: Computer Science and Artificial Intelligence at IIIT-Delhi · GPA 8.91/10 · 2023–2027 · research under Prof. Anubha Gupta (SBILab, Centre for AI, IIIT-Delhi), with the University of Vienna and UC San Diego · incoming SWE intern at S&P Global.
